text: All visitors must ________ in at the front desk before entering the office.
explanation: After the modal verb 'must', the base form of the verb is required: 'must sign'.

text: The marketing team submitted ________ report two days ahead of the deadline.
explanation: A possessive adjective ('their') is needed before the noun 'report'.

text: The new software will be installed ________ all computers are backed up.
explanation: 'Once' introduces a time clause meaning 'as soon as'. 'During' and 'because of' take a noun, not a clause.

text: Sales figures this quarter were significantly higher than ________ of last year.
explanation: 'That' refers back to the singular noun 'figures' as a group comparison ('that of last year').

text: The manager asked employees to ________ their expense reports by Friday.
explanation: 'Submit' (nop) collocates with 'reports'. The other options do not fit the business context.

text: ________ the budget constraints, the project was completed on schedule.
explanation: 'Despite' + noun phrase shows contrast. 'Although' would need a full clause, not just a noun phrase.

text: The board approved the merger only after a ________ review of the financial records.
explanation: 'Thorough' (ky luong) describes a complete, careful review. 'Through' and 'throughout' are prepositions.

text: Had the shipment arrived on time, the client ________ satisfied.
explanation: This is a third conditional (past unreal). The result clause uses 'would have + past participle'.
